step_rationale: Lipoprotein metabolism regulator; influences hsCRP and atherosclerosis risk; cholesterol homeostasis.
mechanism: ApoC-I regulates lipoprotein metabolism and is associated with both retained lipid burden and systemic inflammation in atherosclerosis.
